summary: Rebrand testing complete: AMLGuard → Rudrik. All UI pages show Rudrik branding. Login page has trishul logo, 'Rudrik' title, 'you@rudrik.io' placeholder. Sidebar shows 'Rudrik' with 'COMPLIANCE INTELLIGENCE' tagline and '© 2026 Rudrik Technologies Pvt. Ltd.' footer. Team members now have @rudrik.io emails. Fixed: team member seed emails changed from @sentrixai.com to @rudrik.io, admin email changed from admin@amlguard.com to admin@rudrik.io.
